title: Blackout Pickleball Chicago

title: Juneteenth Pickleball Celebration: Chicago
subtitle: Celebrate Freedom, Culture & Community 🎉
description: CHICAGO! The turnout, the energy, the vibes at our last event were so unreal… we had NO choice but to run it back. This Juneteenth, we're bringing the community together again for another unforgettable night of pickleball, culture, and celebration. Whether you came to the last one or missed out — this is your chance to experience what everyone's been talking about.
refundPolicy: All items are non-refundable, all sales are final
